message:
feat(web): add WebSocket context and 404 page

Add WebSocketProvider stub implementation for mock mode development.
The provider establishes context for real-time gateway communication
with connection state tracking.

Add NotFoundPage component to handle unmatched routes gracefully,
providing a clear user experience for invalid URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
